Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Powder recycling for electron beam powder bed fusion of TiAl alloy☆

Composition_Info.Note: Virgin EIGA powder; O content 560 ppm; Al ± 0.12 at.%

Process_Text.original: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders produced by EIGA with particle size ranging from 53-150 μm; Qbeam S200 EB-PBF equipment; accelerating voltage 60 kV; substrate preheating temperature 1070°C; powder bed preheating temperature 900-1150°C; building temperature 900-1100°C; layer thickness 50 μm; hatching melting strategy with scanning speeds 1.8-2.3 m/s; mean beam current 5.40-8.60 mA; line offset 0.1 mm; EA 1.80-2.24 J/mm²; approximately 20 h per furnace building cycle
Process_Text.simplified: EIGA Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powder (53-150 μm); Qbeam S200 EB-PBF; 60 kV; 50 μm layer; powder bed 900-1150°C; hatching strategy

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Key_Params.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Initial powder particles exhibited dendritic microstructure with dark S-segregation enriched in Al and bright β segregation enriched in Ti and Cr; high sphericity with hollow and satellite particles as primary defects; surface oxide film composed of mixed TiO₂/Al₂O₃ (53.98%:46.02%)
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Dendritic microstructure with S-segregation and β segregation; mixed oxide surface layer

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: γ and α/α₂ phases; disordered phases
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: Homogeneous alpha-phase structures in virgin powders
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Morphology: high sphericity with hollow and satellite particles

Composition_Info.Note: First recycled powder (1 cycle); O content 580 ppm; Al ± 0.2 at.%

Process_Text.original: First recycled powder after 1 EB-PBF building cycle; same EIGA Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powder; powder recovery system processing, sieving, mixing, and reloading; tilting mixer 30 r/min for 30-45 min under inert gas atmosphere
Process_Text.simplified: First recycled powder (1 cycle); standard PRS recovery and mixing

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: α/α₂-phase gradually decreased with increasing recycling; interdendritic γ-region expanded; small amount of irregular particles observed
Microstructure_Text.simplified: α/α₂ phase decreasing; γ region expanding; few irregular particles

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Morphology: small amount of irregular particles observed

Composition_Info.Note: 5 recycling cycles; O content 660 ppm; Al ± 0.2 at.%; minimal Al loss (<0.5 at.%)

Process_Text.original: After 5 EB-PBF building cycles; same EIGA Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powder; powder recovery system processing, sieving, mixing, and reloading after each cycle; total thermal exposure time approximately 100 h
Process_Text.simplified: 5 recycled powder (100 h thermal exposure); PRS recovery and mixing

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: α/α₂-phase gradually decreased; interdendritic γ-region continued to expand; small amount of irregular particles observed; particle size distribution narrowed, improving uniformity; enhanced flowability and apparent density
Microstructure_Text.simplified: α/α₂ decreasing, γ increasing; narrow PSD; improved flowability

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Particle_Size_Distribution: narrowed after first cycle, improved uniformity

Composition_Info.Note: 10 recycling cycles; particle size distribution continued to narrow with 50-100 μm particles predominant; >30% of powders unirradiated by EB (minimizing Al loss)

Process_Text.original: After 10 EB-PBF building cycles; same EIGA Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powder; powder recovery system processing; total thermal exposure approximately 200 h; >30% of powders still unirradiated
Process_Text.simplified: 10 recycled powder (200 h thermal exposure); most powders now EB-irradiated

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Particle size distribution narrowed; 50-100 μm particles predominant; increased irregular particles; flowability enhanced; apparent density elevated through removal of large irregular particles
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Narrowed PSD; 50-100 μm dominant; irregular particles increased

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Morphology: increased irregular particles compared to R5

Composition_Info.Note: 15 recycling cycles; O content 890 ppm (22 ppm/cycle uptake); Al ± 0.1 at.%; >93% of powders now EB-irradiated

Process_Text.original: After 15 EB-PBF building cycles; same EIGA Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powder; powder recovery system processing; total thermal exposure approximately 300 h; >93% of powders EB-irradiated; two distinct types of irregular particles emerged: fused satellite particles and partially surface melted particles
Process_Text.simplified: 15 recycled powder (300 h thermal exposure); >93% EB-irradiated; C14 Laves phase (10-20 nm) precipitation beginning

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: α/α₂-phase continued to decrease; interdendritic γ-region expanded; two distinct types of irregular particles emerged: fused satellite particles adhering to larger counterparts and particles with partial surface melting traces without complete fusion; Cr-Ti Laves phases (10-20 nm) identified by TEM at oxide/matrix interfaces; Cr enrichment at oxide/matrix interfaces; progressive γ-phase coarsening beginning; surface oxide beginning transition from mixed TiO₂/Al₂O₃ to Al₂O₃-dominated
Microstructure_Text.simplified: γ phase dominant; α/α₂ decreasing; C14 Laves (10-20 nm) at boundaries; Cr enrichment at interfaces; oxide transition beginning

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: Cr-Ti Laves 10-20 nm; Cr enrichment at interfaces
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Morphology: two distinct types of irregular particles: fused satellite particles and partially melted particles

Composition_Info.Note: 30 recycling cycles; O content 1200 ppm (accelerated to 27.33 ppm/cycle in 15-30 cycles); Al ± 0.7 at.%; significant 1.62-2 at.% Al loss; powder predominantly γ-phase; S-segregation disappeared; block-like α₂ morphology appeared

Process_Text.original: After 30 EB-PBF building cycles; same EIGA Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powder; powder recovery system processing; total thermal exposure approximately 600 h; >99.6% of powders EB-irradiated at least once; rod-shaped particles dominated irregular particles; powder lost dendritic structure showing dispersed Cr-enriched bright spots; Ti/O-rich regions at particle edges
Process_Text.simplified: 30 recycled powder (600 h thermal exposure); >99.6% EB-irradiated; γ dominant; α₂ block-like morphology; Laves phase at edges

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Powder predominantly composed of γ-phase; S-segregation disappeared due to high diffusion rate of Al at 900-1150°C; bright dendritic structure caused by β segregation transformed into block-like α₂ morphology; powder particles containing aggregated bright spots enriched with Cr, decreased Ti and Al; Ti/O-rich regions at particle edges despite lacking continuous oxide films; distinct oxide layers with Cr enrichment at oxide/matrix interfaces; progressive γ-phase coarsening; surface oxide continued transition to Al₂O₃-dominated
Microstructure_Text.simplified: γ dominant; α₂ block-like; Cr-rich bright spots; oxide layers; Al₂O₃ enrichment continuing

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: Ti/O-rich regions at edges; oxide layers; Cr enrichment
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Morphology: rod-shaped particles dominated irregular particles; distinct oxide layers with Cr enrichment at oxide/matrix interfaces

Composition_Info.Note: 30 cycles + 10 kg fresh powder addition (R30b); O content 860 ppm (reduced from 1200); Al ± 0.5 at.%; new powder ~30.3% of mixture after remixing; broadening of particle size distribution due to fresh powder addition

Process_Text.original: After 30 cycles, 10 kg of new powders mixed (from original batch); post-mixing new powders comprised approximately 30.3% of mixture; tilting mixer 30 r/min for 30-45 min under inert gas atmosphere; broadening of particle size distribution
Process_Text.simplified: 30 cycles + 30.3% fresh powder addition; mixed powder; broadened PSD

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: After adding fresh powders, three structures observed: some powder particles lost dendritic structure completely showing dispersed bright spots enriched with Cr with decreased Ti and Al content; particle size distribution broadened due to fresh powder introducing fines (<50 μm) and coarse particles (>100 μm)
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Mixed microstructure; fresh and aged powder blend; broadened PSD

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Morphology: broadened PSD from fresh powder addition; some particles lost dendritic structure with dispersed Cr-enriched bright spots

Composition_Info.Note: 45 recycling cycles; O content 1300 ppm; Al ± 0.6 at.%; fresh powder only 2.4% of mixture; irregular powder >30%; semi-molten agglomerates with elongated structures

Process_Text.original: After 45 EB-PBF building cycles following R30b mixing; total thermal exposure approximately 900 h; fresh powder only 2.4% of mixture; >97% of powders EB-irradiated; semi-molten agglomerates with elongated structures that evaded sieving; irregular powder proportion >30%
Process_Text.simplified: 45 recycled powder (900 h thermal exposure); 2.4% fresh powder; >30% irregular particles; semi-molten agglomerates

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Irregularly shaped particles increased; powder particles containing aggregated bright spots; semi-molten agglomerates with elongated structures evading sieving; particle size distribution broadened due to elongated agglomerates (53-150 μm) and adhered fines (<50 μm) coexisting; Laves phase formation continuing
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Increased irregular particles; elongated agglomerates; broadened PSD; Laves phase continuing

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Morphology: semi-molten agglomerates with elongated structures; irregular powder >30%; elongated agglomerates evading sieving

Composition_Info.Note: 70 recycling cycles; O content 2000 ppm (28 ppm/cycle in 45-70 cycles); Al ± 3 at.% (extreme variation 42.12-49.52 at.%); fresh powder only 0.04%; heterogeneous irradiation and melting histories; Ti-Nb-Cr precipitates identified; surface oxide 82.11% Al₂O₃

Process_Text.original: After 70 EB-PBF building cycles; total thermal exposure approximately 1400 h; fresh powder only 0.04% of mixture; extreme Al content variation (42.12-49.52 at.%) reflecting heterogeneous irradiation and melting histories; Ti-Nb-Cr precipitates (2-3 μm) in irregular powders; surface oxide transformed to 82.11% Al₂O₃-dominated; Cr enrichment at oxide/matrix interfaces
Process_Text.simplified: 70 recycled powder (1400 h thermal exposure); 0.04% fresh powder; Al₂O₃-dominated surface (82.11%); Ti-Nb-Cr precipitates; heterogeneous Al distribution

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Irregularly shaped particles increased; powder particles containing aggregated bright spots (Ti, Cr, Nb enriched, Al depleted); Ti-Nb-Cr precipitates (2-3 μm) distributed around boundaries and within α₂ regions; microstructures of irregular powders non-uniform due to varying Al loss during melting; lamellar agglomerates (α₂+γ) in Al-poor areas; surface oxide transitioned from mixed TiO₂/Al₂O₃ (53.98%:46.02%) to Al₂O₃-dominated (82.11%); Ti³⁺/Cr³⁺ enrichment; oxide densification
Microstructure_Text.simplified: γ dominant; Ti-Nb-Cr precipitates 2-3 μm; Al₂O₃-dominated oxide (82.11%); heterogeneous microstructure from Al variation

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: γ dominant; α/α₂ decreased; Al₂O₃ oxide 82.11%
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: Ti-Nb-Cr precipitates 2-3 μm; Cr enrichment at interfaces
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XPS: Al₂O₃ 82.11%; Ti³⁺/Cr³⁺ enrichment; Al-O peak shifts
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Morphology: semi-molten agglomerates with elongated structures; irregular powder >30%; heterogeneous Al content from uneven melting

Composition_Info.Note: Thin-walled part from R0 (new) powder; γ-band structures with annealed twins; β₀/B₂ phase distributed near grain boundaries

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb parts fabricated using EB-PBF (Qbeam S200); built from R0 (new) powder; layer thickness 50 μm; powder bed temperature 900-1150°C; building temperature 900-1100°C; hatching melting strategy with multiple scanning parameters; tensile specimens machined to 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled parts from virgin powder; 50 μm layer; 900-1100°C build temp

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂+γ), and dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂) along lamellar colony boundaries; distinct γ bands with annealed twins; β₀/B₂ phase distributed near grain boundaries; sub-micron-sized β₀/B₂ precipitates between equiaxed γ grains and lamellar colonies; Ti-rich, Al-poor in lamellar colonies and γ grains; KAM max 4.97; LAGB 5.2%; γ [110] 70° twin boundaries 12.5%
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar α₂+γ colonies; β₀/B₂ at boundaries; γ bands with twins; grain size <10 μm; KAM 4.97

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: γ bands with twins; β₀/B₂ near grain boundaries
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.BSE: Equiaxed γ; lamellar colonies; β₀/B₂ spots

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: RT ultimate tensile strength; range from 682-750 MPa

Composition_Info.Note: Thin-walled part from R5 powder; γ-band structures with annealed twins; O content 680 ppm

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb parts fabricated using EB-PBF from R5 powder; layer thickness 50 μm; building temperature 900-1100°C; tensile specimens 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled from R5 powder; 50 μm layer; 900-1100°C

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂+γ), and dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂) along lamellar colony boundaries; distinct γ bands with annealed twins similar to S0
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar α₂+γ colonies; β₀/B₂ at boundaries; γ bands with twins

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.BSE: Equiaxed γ; lamellar colonies; β₀/B₂ spots
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: γ bands with twins; similar to S0

Composition_Info.Note: Thin-walled part from R10 powder; γ-band structures with annealed twins; O content 730 ppm

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb parts from R10 powder; EB-PBF; layer thickness 50 μm; building temp 900-1100°C

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂+γ), and dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂) along lamellar colony boundaries; distinct γ bands with annealed twins
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar α₂+γ colonies; β₀/B₂ at boundaries; γ bands with twins

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.BSE: Equiaxed γ; lamellar colonies; β₀/B₂ spots

Composition_Info.Note: Thin-walled part from R15 powder; pronounced γ bands absent; more pronounced lamellar clusters; O content 740 ppm; significant Al decrease to 46.95 at.%

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb parts from R15 powder; EB-PBF; layer thickness 50 μm; building temp 900-1100°C; tensile specimens 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂+γ), and increased dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂) along lamellar colony boundaries and inside γ bulk; pronounced γ bands absent; more pronounced lamellar clusters; KAM max 4.99; LAGB 7.4%; C₁₅ Laves phase (Cr₁.₉₃Ti₁.₀₇) dispersed around lamellar colony boundaries and within α₂ regions; Ti and Cr enriched without significant Al and Nb enrichment in precipitates; grain size <10 μm with excellent uniformity
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar α₂+γ; increased β₀/B₂; C₁₅ Laves at boundaries; no γ bands; <10 μm grains

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: No γ bands; more lamellar clusters; KAM 4.99; LAGB 7.4%
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.BSE: Increased bright spots; more lamellar clusters

Composition_Info.Note: Thin-walled part from R30 powder; β₀/B₂ phase peaks prominent in XRD; O content 860 ± 10 ppm; Al ± 0.6 at.%

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb parts from R30 powder; EB-PBF; layer thickness 50 μm; building temp 900-1100°C; tensile specimens 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled from R30 powder; increased Laves/β₀/B₂ phases

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂+γ), and increased dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂) inside lamellar colonies and γ bulk; β₀/B₂ phase peaks prominent in XRD; γ bands barely visible; grain size <10 μm; β₀/B₂ phase content increasing
Microstructure_Text.simplified: γ + lamellar α₂+γ; prominent β₀/B₂ peaks; increased β₀/B₂ inside colonies; <10 μm grains

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: γ, α₂, β₀/B₂ prominent; Laves present but low
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: Pronounced γ bands; β₀/B₂ near grain boundaries; increasing phase content
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.BSE: Increased bright spots; β₀/B₂ inside colonies and γ bulk

Composition_Info.Note: Thin-walled part from R30b powder (30 cycles + 10 kg fresh); improved ductility vs S30; O content 760 ± 15 ppm; Al ± 0.2 at.%; γ band reappeared; bright spots reduced vs S30

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb parts from R30b powder (30 cycles + 10 kg fresh powder); EB-PBF; layer thickness 50 μm; building temp 900-1100°C; improved ductility observed
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled from R30b (30% fresh powder); improved properties

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂+γ); γ band reappeared; bright spots (β₀/B₂) reduced vs S30; more pronounced lamellar clusters
Microstructure_Text.simplified: γ + lamellar α₂+γ; γ bands returned; reduced β₀/B₂; improved ductility

Composition_Info.Note: Thin-walled part from R45 powder; γ bands barely visible; O content 900 ppm; β₀/B₂ phase content increased

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb parts from R45 powder; EB-PBF; layer thickness 50 μm; building temp 900-1100°C; tensile specimens 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂+γ); γ bands barely visible; increased spheroidized and agglomerated β₀/B₂ phase; grain size <10 μm; β₀/B₂ phase content increased
Microstructure_Text.simplified: γ + lamellar α₂+γ; γ bands faint; increased β₀/B₂ agglomerates; <10 μm grains

Composition_Info.Note: Thin-walled part from R70 powder; highest strength 750 MPa; brittle fracture in two parallel specimens; O content 940 ± 40 ppm; Al ± 0.5 at.%; >60% grains <5 μm; β₀/B₂ phase 4.6%; C₁₄ Laves phase (TiNbCr₄)

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb parts from R70 powder; EB-PBF; layer thickness 50 μm; building temp 900-1100°C; 70 recycling cycles; tensile specimens 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness; brittle fracture in two parallel specimens from excessive O contamination (>2000 ppm powder) and irregular powder content
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled from R70 powder; highest strength; brittle fracture; grain refinement <5 μm; 4.6% β₀/B₂

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂+γ); spheroidized and agglomerated β₀/B₂ grown larger from point-like to irregular agglomerations; β₀/B₂ inside lamellar colonies and γ bulk; γ bands barely visible; grain size <5 μm with >60% <5 μm; C₁₄ Laves phase (TiNbCr₄) 2-3 μm at boundaries and within α₂ regions; Ti, Cr, Nb enriched with notable Al depletion in precipitates; KAM max 4.99; LAGB 8.15%; twin boundaries 5.61%; grain refinement from heterogeneous nucleation (partially unmelted Cr-rich aggregates, TiCr₂, Al₂O₃); Hall-Petch strengthening from grain refinement; Orowan strengthening from submicron intergranular precipitates; grain boundary proliferation and oxide dispersion embrittled material
Microstructure_Text.simplified: γ + lamellar α₂+γ; 4.6% β₀/B₂ (agglomerated); C₁₄ Laves (TiNbCr₄) 2-3 μm; <5 μm grains (60% <5 μm); Hall-Petch + Orowan strengthening; embrittled

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: γ, α₂, β₀/B₂ prominent; C₁₄ Laves
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: Grain size <5 μm (60% <5 μm); KAM 4.99; LAGB 8.15%; twins 5.61%
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: C₁₄ Laves (TiNbCr₄) 2-3 μm; Ti/Cr/Nb enriched; Al depleted
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Hall_Petch_Strengthening: grain refinement from <10 μm to <5 μm

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Highest ultimate tensile strength (750 MPa); increased 3.2±0.5 MPa per 0.1 at.% Al loss; grain refinement + Laves/B₂ phases + Hall-Petch + Orowan strengthening

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Lowest ductility (0.8%); 60% reduction (2.1%-0.8%); reduced 0.8±0.2% per 0.1 at.% Al loss; brittle fracture in two parallel specimens from excessive O contamination (>2000 ppm) and irregular powder
